name: galbagrama-arcade
description: Lobby central de juegos de Galbagrama

scripts.build: npm run build --prefix Nonograma && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/ && cp style.css dist/ && cp -r Nonograma/dist dist/Nonograma
scripts.deploy: npm run build && git add -f dist && git commit -m "Deploy to GitHub Pages" && git push origin `git subtree split --prefix dist main`:refs/heads/gh-pages --force && git reset --hard HEAD~1
